revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24598347618|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[ja:天津賀佐彦神社]] {{Infobox religious building | name = Amatsukasahiko Shrine (Q107410067) | native_name = 天津賀佐彦神社 | image = 阿波国式内社論社天都賀佐彦神社(美馬町西荒川).jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Amatsukasahiko Shrine (Q107410067) | coordinates = {{coord|34.055083333333336|134.03583333333333}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }} {{nihongo|'''Amatsukasahiko Shrine'''|天津賀佐彦神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} * {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database == part of (P361) == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)|ja|阿波国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11657514|1=List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)}} ** Series ordinal: 13 ** P155: {{ill|Ameyoritateno Shrine|lt=Ameyoritateno Shrine|qid=Q135041311|1=Ameyoritateno Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Q135041314|ltq=Q135041314|qid=Q135041314|1=Yasokono Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Mima, Tokushima|lt=Mima|ar|ميما (توكوشيما)|azb|میما، توکوشیما|ca|Mima (ciutat)|ceb|Mima Shi|ce|Мима (гӀала)|de|Mima|en|Mima, Tokushima|envoyage|Mima|es|Mima (Tokushima)|fa|میما، توکوشیما|fi|Mima|fr|Mima|frvoyage|Mima|gl|Mima|hy|Միմա (քաղաք)|id|Mima, Tokushima|it|Mima|ja|美馬市|ko|미마시|mzn|میما، توکوشیما|nl|Mima|pl|Mima|pt|Mima|ro|Mima|ru|Мима (город)|sv|Mima, Tokushima|tg|Мима|tl|Mima, Tokushima|tr|Mima|tt|Мима (шәһәр)|uk|Міма (Токусіма)|vi|Mima, Tokushima|war|Mima, Tokushima|zh_classical|美馬市|zh_min_nan|Mima-chhī|zh_yue|美馬|zh|美馬市|qid=Q857828|1=Mima, Tokushima}} * {{ill|Q907457|ltq=Q907457|qid=Q907457|1=Awa Province (Tokushima)}} * {{ill|Mima District, Tokushima|lt=Mima district|ceb|Mima Gun|en|Mima District, Tokushima|es|Distrito de Mima|fr|District de Mima|id|Distrik Mima, Tokushima|it|Distretto di Mima|ja|美馬郡|ko|미마군|pl|Powiat Mima|uk|Повіт Міма|zh|美馬郡|qid=Q1156496|1=Mima District, Tokushima}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|34.055083333333336|134.03583333333333}} == image (P18) == * 阿波国式内社論社天都賀佐彦神社(美馬町西荒川).jpg == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 183187 ** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == name in kana (P1814) == * あまつかさひこじんじゃ == different from (P1889) == * {{ill|Amatsukasahiko Shrine|lt=Amatsukasahiko Shrine|ja|天都賀佐比古神社|qid=Q107410066|1=Amatsukasahiko Shrine}} == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Q135041313|ltq=Q135041313|qid=Q135041313|1=Amatsukasahikono Shrine}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '徳島県美馬市美馬町西荒川48-1', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '徳島県美馬市美馬町轟', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:天津賀佐彦神社]] {{wikidata link|Q107410067}} == Japanese content == {{Confused|Amatsukasa-hiko Shrine}} {{Shinto shrine |Name= Amatsukasa-hiko Shrine |Image= [[File:Awa Province Engishiki-sha Ronsha Amatsukasa-hiko Shrine (Mima Town Nishi-Arakawa).jpg|250px]] |Location= {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|qid=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Mima City|Q857828|qid=Q857828|1=Mima, Tokushima}}{{ill|lt=Mima Town|Q11609479|qid=Q11609479|1=Mimachō}} Nishi-Arakawa 48-1 |Coordinates = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |Enshrined deity= {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shina-nagato-be-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} |Shrine status= {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Engishiki shrine|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286|lt=Shikinaisha}} (candidate shrine) |Founded= Unknown |Main hall= |Other name= |Annual festival= {{ill|lt=October 19|Q2961|qid=Q2961|1=October 19}} |Rituals= |Map = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=Amatsukasa-hiko
Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Amatsukasa-hiko Shrine''' (あまつかさひこじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|qid=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Mima City|Q857828|qid=Q857828|1=Mima, Tokushima}}{{ill|lt=Mima Town|Q11609479|qid=Q11609479|1=Mimachō}}. === History === The year of foundation is unknown. The *{{ill|lt=Awa-shi|Q65291985|qid=Q65291985|1=Awa-shi}}* states: “Amatsukahi-ko Shrine: listed in the *Engishiki*, also considered a minor shrine; located in Arakawa village of Shigekiyo; also called Nishioka-no-miya.”{{Cite web|Japanese-language book|url=https://www.buccyake-kojiki.com/archives/1070231126.html|title=Amatsukasa-hiko Shrine|publisher=Shrines and the Kojiki|accessdate=2021-05-21}} It is one of the candidate shrines (ronsha) for Amatsukasa-biko Shrine, which is an {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Engishiki shrine|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286|lt=Shikinaisha}}. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shina-nagato-be-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} === Access === * About 10 minutes by car from “{{ill|lt=Kojima Station|Q7106623|qid=Q7106623|1=Oshima Station}}” on the {{ill|lt=Shikoku Railway Company|Q496531|qid=Q496531|lt=JR|1=Shikoku Railway Company}}{{ill|lt=Tokushima Line|Q899310|qid=Q899310|1=Tokushima Line}}. === Notes === {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Amatsukasahiko Shrine (Q107410067)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Amatsukasahiko Shrine (Q107410067)]][[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Tokushima Prefecture]] [[Category:美馬市の建築物]] [[Category:美馬市の歴史]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Tokushima Prefecture]]
